wordplay_note: Ragle's brother-in-law and unwitting participant in the simulation
card_description: Vic Nielson is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Time Out of Joint*. Ordinary family man who cannot see that his entire town is a construct. Name note: Ragle's brother-in-law and unwitting participant in the simulation. The person who accepts consensus reality without question. First appears in *Time Out of Joint*.

reference.brief: Ordinary family man who cannot see that his entire town is a construct
reference.significance: The person who accepts consensus reality without question
